name: World News
description: Top 5 world news headlines with short, plain-language summaries.

fallback_stories.title: World Leaders Meet for Peace Talks
fallback_stories.summary: Leaders from many countries gathered to discuss ways to keep the world safe and peaceful.

fallback_stories.title: Scientists Make Exciting Discovery
fallback_stories.summary: Researchers have found something new that could help improve people's health and lives.

fallback_stories.title: Communities Come Together After Storm
fallback_stories.summary: Neighbours helped each other rebuild after a strong storm passed through the region.

fallback_stories.title: Museum Opens a New History Exhibit
fallback_stories.summary: Families and visitors gather to enjoy art, stories, and treasured objects from the past.

fallback_stories.title: Town Garden Project Brings Joy
fallback_stories.summary: Volunteers planted flowers and made a shared public space brighter and more welcoming.
